Program Overview
Accredited by the American Society of
Health-System Pharmacists (ASHP/ACPE)

A top training program for a fast-growing healthcare career

As a pharmacy technician, you'll work alongside pharmacists and other health workers in a retail pharmacy or a healthcare system. Our online pharmacy technician program teaches the topics that matter on the job.

You'll learn about medicine orders, how a pharmacy runs, and how to care for patients — plus how to handle insurance claims, help dispense medications, and deliver great patient service.

After finishing, you'll be ready to take the Pharmacy Technician Certification Board (PTCB) exam and/or the NHA ExCPT exam — nationally recognized credentials that open more job options and room to advance.

Enroll Today View Program Guide
